mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, username, name, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM tasks WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, title, content, username, name, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id} AND username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks ( title, content, username, name, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{contents}, #{username}, #{name}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = #{title}, content = #{contents}, username = #{username}, name = #{name}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
